name: CHAR Technologies Ltd.
summary: CHAR Technologies Ltd., a cleantech development and services company, engages in biocarbon development activity. It offers SulfaCHAR, a gas-cleaning solution that removes hydrogen sulfide from renewable natural gas; Cleanfyre, a carbon neutral coal replacement; and equipment for industrial air and water treatment. The company also provides environmental consulting services comprising environmental management, site investigation and remediation, engineering, and resource services. It serves food and beverage, industrial, and renewable gas project customers. CHAR Technologies Ltd. was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in North York, Canada.
